description: A named SQL query stored in tag.db.queries. Executed on demand by the query:run Tool or fired automatically when its trigger tag transitions. Result is coerced to a scalar/JSON and written to output_tag (optional).

db.description: Which SQLite: L2/state/state.db, root tag.db, or L4/database/acg.db

sql.description: SELECT only. Parameter bindings via :name are looked up in inputs at runtime.

output_tag.description: Tag written with the result (scalar if single cell, JSON otherwise).

trigger.description: Optional on_transition binding — when set, query fires on a matching state-machine event.
